sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48093" key="qe/lumna" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θέλυμνα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θέμεθλα</foreign>, <sense id="n48093.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foundations</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">elements of things</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θ. τε καὶ στερεωπά</foreign> cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θελημνά, θελημά</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:21:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.6</biblScope></bibl>. (Cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προθέλυμνος, τετραθέλυμνος</foreign>.)</sense> </entryFree>
